debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
inst✝² : FiniteDimensional ℝ E
inst✝¹ : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝ : BorelSpace E
L : StrongDual ℝ E
⊢ variance (⇑L) (@ProbabilityTheory.stdGaussianMulti E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹) =
    ∑ i, L ((stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E) i) ^ 2

failed_attempts: _num

have h_cross : ∀ i j, i ≠ j →
          ∫ (a : Fin (Module.finrank ℝ E) → ℝ), a i * a j ∂Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1 = 0 := by
        intro i j hij
        rw [integral_prod_mul_of_independent (μ := fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) (f := fun x ↦ x) (g := fun x ↦ x)]
        · simp [gaussianReal_integral, hij]
        · infer_instance
        · exact fun k ↦ (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).mono (by norm_num)
        · exact fun k ↦ (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).mono (by norm_num)
      have h_diag : ∀ i,
          ∫ (a : Fin (Module.finrank ℝ E) → ℝ), a i * a i ∂Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1 = 1 := by
        intro i
        rw [integral_eval_pi (i := i) (f := fun x ↦ x * x)]
        · simp [gaussianReal_integral_sq]
        · infer_instance
        · rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]
          exact (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).mono (by norm_num)
      simp_all only [Finset.sum_ite, Finset.sum_const, Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero]
      simp [Finset.sum_ite_eq, h_diag, h_cross]
simp [integral_sq_gaussianReal]

have h_ij : ∀ i j, (∫ (a : Fin (Module.finrank ℝ E) → ℝ), a i * a j ∂Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) =

        · rw [integral_mul_eq_integral_mul_integral_of_indep]
          · simp [gaussianReal.mean_zero, h]
          · exact indep_pi_left_right
          · exact integrable_eval_pi (i := i) (f := id) (by rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 1)
          · exact integrable_eval_pi (i := j) (f := id) (by rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 1)
      simp_all only [h_ij, Finset.sum_ite, Finset.sum_const, Finset.sum_eq_single]
      intro i _
      simp [sq]

have h_off_diag : ∀ i j, i ≠ j →

          intro i j hij
          have : ∫ a, a i * a j ∂Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1 =

              try infer_instance

        have h_diag : ∀ i,
            ∫ a, a i * a i ∂Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1 = 1 := by
          intro i
          have : ∫ a, a i * a i ∂Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1 =
